name: github-workflow
description: Portable GitHub workflow plugin with bundled Codex skills and gh wrapper.

interface.shortDescription: PR creation and review workflow skills
interface.longDescription: Packages reusable create-pull-request and review-pull-request Codex skills with a bundled gh wrapper that can switch between bot identities.
defaultPrompt: Use $create-pull-request to open a PR for this repo.
Use $review-pull-request to approve the open PR.
